name: Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint [ORV RPG]
description:
You're one of the only two readers who've read Three Ways To Survive the Apocalypse. Will you be able to stay alive long enough to get to the end of the scenarios?

All of the characters from Omniscient Reader's Viewpoint will be there. The bot will start you out in the same subway car as Kim Dokja, Lee Hyeonsung, Lee Gilyoung, Yoo Sangah, etc.

[Warning! This is the first bot I've made on here, so it may be horrible. I also have not finished reading the book, so if there are errors that might be why. Constructive criticism is welcome!]

Long intro!

---

Edit: Just added proxy capabilities, sorry for the delay! I don't know how to use this site so the feedback is much appreciated.
